---
name: Feature Request 💡
about: Suggest an idea for GraphLens™
title: '[FEAT] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

### ⚠️ Prerequisite

-   [ ] I have searched the existing issues to ensure this is not a duplicate.

### Feature Proposal 🚀

A clear and concise description of what the feature is.

### Problem Statement 🤔

Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.
_Example: I'm always frustrated when I have to manually look for..._

### Proposed Solution ✨

Describe the solution you'd like.
_Example: A new command or filter in the WebView that allows..._

### Alternatives Considered 🔄

Describe alternatives you've considered.
_Example: Using the standard VS Code search..._

### UI/UX Mockups 📸

If applicable, add screenshots or simple drawings to help explain your idea.

### Additional Context

Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here.

---

> **⚠️ Privacy Note:** Please do not share any private code or sensitive logic. GraphLens respects your privacy.
